name: SAP Labs
overview_text: SAP Labs is a software development company that develops enterprise software solutions for various industries. It is the largest subsidiary of SAP SE and has offices in over 70 countries worldwide.

offerings_description: SAP Labs offers a wide range of enterprise software solutions, including ERP, CRM, and SCM. Their solutions cater to various industries and help businesses improve efficiency and profitability.
core_value_proposition: Helping businesses become more efficient, profitable, and customer-centric

description: SAP Labs is a software development company that develops enterprise software solutions for various industries. It is the largest subsidiary of SAP SE and has offices in over 70 countries worldwide.
vision_statement: Empowering people and organizations to make the digital world a better place.
mission_statement: To help the world run better and improve people's lives.
sales_motion: SAP Labs offers a range of services, including consulting, implementation, and support, to help businesses run more efficiently and effectively.
exit_strategy_history: SAP has a history of successful acquisitions and divestitures, including the sale of its database business to Oracle in 2010.
ethical_sourcing: SAP has a strong commitment to ethical sourcing and has implemented various initiatives to ensure responsible supply chain practices.
benchmark_vs_peers: SAP is a leader in the enterprise software market, with a strong reputation for innovation and customer satisfaction.
industry_associations: International Association for Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence
case_studies: SAP helps Coca-Cola streamline operations and improve customer satisfaction
SAP enables Siemens to improve supply chain efficiency and reduce costs
sustainability_csr: SAP has a strong commitment to sustainability and has set various goals to reduce its environmental impact, including a goal to be carbon neutral by 2025.
crisis_behavior: SAP has a strong crisis management plan in place, with a focus on transparency, communication, and stakeholder engagement.
